prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为约13666名→12683名→21484名→17058名→27611名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年较2024年后移约10553名，基准位次 约27611名；2021–2025年理科/物理类计划数分别为627→631→656→660→641人，2026年计划大幅扩招至810人，较2025年增加169人（+26.4%），扩招幅度显 著，竞争压力理论上有所缓解，但位次数字应相应增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2026年第70名（2025年第70名、2024年第67名），近年排名 稳定在60–70区间，属中上游211；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及文学院副教授贾浅浅被举报抄袭事件，学校已成立专班调查，对学术声誉有一定影 响；抖音热度排名第81位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，地质学A、考古学A、软件工程A-，考古学与地质学 为全国顶尖水平，软件工程为优势工科，与计算机类、电子信息类等招生专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热 度高热推荐，与西北大学物理类招生专业群高度匹配；2026年陕西省物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约34032人（+19.7%），竞争显著加剧；西北大学位于陕西省西安市，为本省唯一省属211综合类大学，在本省招生占比极高（物理类2025年计划641人占该校物理类总计划绝大部分） ，本省考生报考意愿强烈，地域偏好明显。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次27611名、2026年大幅扩招26.4%、物理类考生增加约19.7%加剧竞争、 学校声誉偏负面轻微抑制热度等因素；预测2026年物理类最低位次约32180名，区间31680–32680名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 13666 → 12683 → 21484 → 17058 → 27611, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, the ranking moved back by about 10553 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 27611. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Science/Physics Category were 627 → 631 → 656 → 660 → 641, and in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 810, an increase of 169 (+26.4%) compared to 2025. The expansion is substantial, theoretically easing competition pressure, but the ranking numbers should correspondingly increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 70th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (70th in 2025, 67th in 2024), with recent rankings stable in the 60–70 range, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving the plagiarism accusation against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Literature, with the university having established a special team for investigation, which has a certain impact on academic reputation. Douyin popularity ranking is 81st (rated as 'average'), with moderate short video exposure. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Geology received an A, Archaeology an A, and Software Engineering an A-, with Archaeology and Geology at the national top level, and Software Engineering as a advantageous engineering discipline, highly related to enrollment majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular in society, closely matching the enrollment major groups of Northwest University's Physics Category. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Shaanxi Province is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (+19.7%) compared to 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, and is the only provincial 211 comprehensive university in the province, with a very high proportion of enrollment within the province (the 2025 plan of 641 for Physics Category accounts for the vast majority of the university's total Physics Category enrollment), leading to strong willingness among local examinees to apply and a clear regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 27611, the significant 26.4% enrollment expansion in 2026, the approximately 19.7% increase in Physics Category examinees intensifying competition, and the slightly negative school reputation mildly suppressing popularity, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking for Physics Category is approximately 32180, with a range of 31680–32680.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With the predicted ranking in the 31680–32680 range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (popular majors like Computer Class and Electronic Information Class have ranking requirements far below the predicted range, so careful evaluation is needed), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. When the ranking is near the lower limit of the range (31680), appropriately increase the chance of reaching for Tier 1 majors; when near the upper limit (32680), prioritize stability with Tier 2 majors and safety with Tier 3 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 2453 → 2764 → 2405 → 2974 → 5919, with a shift of about 2945 positions backward in 2025 compared to 2024, and a baseline ranking of about 5919; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for liberal arts/history category were 416 → 402 → 393 → 394 → 390, with an expansion to 440 in 2026, an increase of 50 (+12.8%) compared to 2025, a moderate expansion, and the ranking numbers should correspondingly increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 70th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, a mid-to-upper tier 211 comprehensive university; reputation evaluation in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative (Jia Qianqian plagiarism incident), Douyin popularity ranking 81st (evaluation 'average'), overall exposure and attention are moderately low; Archaeology A (top in the country), Geology A; Archaeology and History, Cultural Heritage and Museology and other enrollment majors directly correspond, attracting strong interest from liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Chinese major is socially recommended, Law is in a wait-and-see period of differentiation, Teacher Education is also in a wait-and-see period; in 2026, the number of history category candidates in Shaanxi Province is about 88,500, an increase of about 12,859 (+17.0%) compared to 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition; Northwest University is located in the provincial capital Xi'an, a preferred comprehensive 211 university for local candidates, with a relatively high proportion of history category enrollment plans, and strong willingness of local candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5919, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 12.8%, the increase of history category candidates by about 17.0% intensifying competition, and the slightly negative reputation mildly suppressing popularity; the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 history category is about 6424, with a range of 5924–6924.
